messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Morning briefing sent 3-4x with inconsistent language and diagram attachments
What it solves: Investigate the briefing send path as a whole rather than each symptom in
isolation, on the theory that several sends firing that morning (duplicate
guard failure) is also why they look inconsistent with each other — each
invocation may independently resolve language/diagram-attachment state,
so N …
How it works: The daily briefing sends at most once per day

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: NeedsApproval: BL-406 - ---; git show 09ccb473 -- '*.md' 2>&1 | head -50 * Unravelling… (26s · ↓ 1.2k tokens · thinking with medium effort) ⏵⏵ bypass permissions on (shift+tab to cycle) · install gh for PR status  /rc

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-406 - Morning briefing sent 3-4x with inconsistent language and diagram attachments is complete.
